response.step_by_step_log: The video was watched in its entirety. The first part (00:00-01:50) consists of an MC speaking in Japanese to the audience to outline event rules. The second part (01:51-02:18) features crowd cheering. The final part (02:19-05:03) consists of audience reaction shots over an upbeat instrumental backing track. No vocal songs or lyrics were identified in this video segment, so no web searches were necessary.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert audience, starting with an MC's introduction and event rules, followed by several minutes of audience reaction shots set to an upbeat instrumental track. No vocal songs were performed in this specific segment.

scenes.description: MC addressing the audience, explaining event rules and guidelines in Japanese.
Audience cheering and waving light sticks in anticipation.
Upbeat instrumental pop music plays while the camera pans across the concert crowd.
